## Login procedure

I need to login using my email address and password, then I get a code that send to my phone

https://login.myxtra.be/dcsxtraprod.onmicrosoft.com/B2C_1A_signin/client/perftrace?tx=StateProperties=eyJUSUQiOiIzMTcyNmQyYS0zODRjLTQzNDEtYjgwMy01ZDIwOGNmNjI5N2YifQ&p=B2C_1A_signin
